# gandi_nameservers (Resource)

Manages the registry-level nameservers of a Gandi domain. Deleting this resource stops Terraform managing the nameservers but does not reset them at the registry.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gandi_nameservers" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
  nameservers = [
    "dakota.ns.cloudflare.com",
    "zoe.ns.cloudflare.com",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain (FQDN) whose nameservers are managed.
- `nameservers` (List of String) Ordered list of nameserver hostnames. Minimum one.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The domain (FQDN); same as `domain`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Nameservers are imported by domain (FQDN).
terraform import gandi_nameservers.example example.com
```
